entities.name: Status
entities.context: Category of emojis indicating current state or status of items in V's system

entities.name: completed
entities.context: Status indicator (✅) for items completed successfully

entities.name: failed
entities.context: Status indicator (❌) for items that failed or errored

entities.name: in_progress
entities.context: Status indicator (🚧) for work in progress or under construction

entities.name: scheduled
entities.context: Status indicator (⏰) for scheduled or recurring items

relationships.context: completed is a status type within the Status category
failed is a status type within the Status category
in_progress is a status type within the Status category
scheduled is a status type within the Status category
